params.name: Pulitzer Prize
params.description: The Pulitzer Prize is one of the world's most prestigious and respected awards in journalism, literature, and music composition, proposed by American newspaper magnate Joseph Pulitzer. The Pulitzer Prize aims to recognize individuals or groups who have made outstanding contributions in the fields of journalism, literary creation, and music composition. Each spring, Columbia University announces the list of Pulitzer Prize winners and holds an award ceremony within the following month. Today, the  …
